acq_dominant_residual_remeasurement.boundary: Future current-baseline remeasurement only; no current measurement and no publish candidate before remeasurement.
acq_dominant_residual_remeasurement.trigger_condition_for_future_round: Explicit ACQ_DOMINANT Current Baseline Remeasurement Round after a sealed source-expansion or baseline decision names it as open.

blanket_isolation_forbidden_maintenance.boundary: Maintain the existing forbidden state for FUNCTION_NARROW and ACQ_DOMINANT blanket isolation.
forbidden_action: internal_only expansion based on semantic narrowness or acquisition dominance alone
blanket_isolation_forbidden_maintenance.trigger_condition_for_future_round: A later sealed decision explicitly reopens the blanket isolation policy, which this round does not do.

publish_mutation_review.boundary: Not open in this round; requires remeasurement plus a separate publish writer authority reopen decision.
publish_mutation_review.trigger_condition_for_future_round: Fresh baseline remeasurement and a later explicit sealed publish mutation review opening decision.

structural_signal_observer_readpoint_sea.boundary: Observer-only readpoint and scope separation over the 2026-05-28 reconstructed authority.
structural_signal_observer_readpoint_sea.trigger_condition_for_future_round: A later sealed decision explicitly supersedes the 2026-05-29 scope separation manifest, such as after source-expansion closeout or a future scope re-separation closeout.

lifetime.current_readpoint_until: superseded by explicit sealed decision, such as ACQ_DOMINANT Current Baseline Remeasurement Round closeout or future scope re-separation after source-expansion closeout
